name: VLS
message: Vincent Lighting SystemsHeadquarters: 6161 Cochran Rd Ste D, Solon, Ohio, 44139, United StatesPhone Number: (216) 475-7600Website: www.vls.comRevenue: $17.7MVLS provides reliable entertainment and architectural lighting and rigging products that are inspected, maintained and tested for compliance with industry standards prior to delivery. Our reputation for reliability is backed with a commitment to providing on-time delivery, a personal equipment operation guarantee and after-hours project, rental and production support.
